rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RANDALL P. TREFZGER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order For Payment Of Family Allowance
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion for Reconsideration is denied. Petitioner failed to meet the statutory requirement of CCP Section 1008(a). The petitioner failed to show the existence of new or different facts, law or circumstances justifyiing reconsideration of the Court's August 9, 2016 Order for Payment of Family Allowance. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than September 20, 2016 at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE OF THE GAETKE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Clarification Of Order Signed On June 21 2016 And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion for Clarification of Order Signed on June 21, 2016 is granted. There is ambiguity in the language of the June 21, 2016 Order that requires the Court to specify whether it intended the fees to be paid by Respondent out of her personal funds or with the Trust's assets. The Court's amended order clarifies that Respondent must pay for the attorney's fees from her own personal funds, and not from the Trust's funds. Respondent's bad faith or mismanagement of the Trust in failing to comply with two other Court orders necessitated the motion to compel. Respondent is ordered to return the funds paid from the Trust's assets in compliance with the June 21, 2016 order to the Trust. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than September 20, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
